identity: A small clockwork turret, the size of a cat. Brass body standing on three ornate bronze legs, central glowing arcane-blue crystal eye, exposed gears turning on the sides, brass barrel mounted on top, tiny pennant flag. Polished brass and amber wood, steampunk-fantasy.
outfit: Brass plating with rivets; amber-wood inlays; bronze legs; pennant flag on top.
weapons: Top-mounted brass barrel that fires arcane-blue bolts.
attackStyle: East-facing profile, firing the brass barrel — muzzle flash of arcane-blue energy, steam puff, gears mid-spin.
koStyle: East-facing profile, tipped on its side, gears loose and scattered, crystal eye dim and cracked, wisp of smoke.
southStyle: Front-facing idle, crystal eye lit, legs planted, barrel aimed slightly up.
portraitStyle: Front-view portrait, full turret visible with workshop glow atmosphere.
notes: M269 Tinker class companion — 5 poses only (portrait, south, east, east_attack, east_ko), matching war_dog companion framework.
